sidebarLinks.iosAppUnsupported: Apps cannot be launched on iOS
sidebarLinks.editOnDesktop: Edit links from the desktop app

calendarReset.title: Bulk delete calendar data
calendarReset.description: Move the selected data to Trash (soft delete). Choosing "Routines" also deletes the schedule entries generated from those routines. Everything can be restored from Trash at any time.
calendarReset.footnote: Soft-deleted items remain in Trash and can be restored later.
calendarReset.success: Deleted — todos {{tasks}} / events {{events}} / routines {{routines}} (incl. {{cascaded}} generated entries) / dailies {{dailies}} / notes {{notes}}
calendarReset.noSelection: Select at least one kind to delete.

claude.title: Claude Code
claude.description: Register the MCP Server so Claude Code can access your todos, schedules, and memos via natural language.
claude.notInstalled: Claude Code is not installed. Install it first, then try again.
claude.mcpToolsDescription: Available MCP tools that Claude Code can use to interact with your data.
claude.claudeMdDescription: Edit the CLAUDE.md instructions file used by Claude Code in ~/life-editor/.
claude.skillsDescription: Manage Claude Code skills installed in ~/life-editor/.claude/skills/.

list_tasks.description: Retrieve a list of todos. You can filter by status, date range, or folder.

params.status: Filter by status (not started / in progress / done)

get_task.description: Get a single todo by its ID.

get_task_tree.description: Get todos as a folder hierarchy tree. Useful for seeing the big picture.

params.root_id: Folder/todo ID to start from (omit for full tree)
params.max_depth: How many levels deep to retrieve (omit for unlimited)

params.title: Todo title
params.parent_id: Folder to place the todo in

update_task.description: Update an existing todo. Only specify the fields you want to change.

params.title: New title
params.status: New status (not started / in progress / done)

delete_task.description: Move a todo to the trash (can be restored later).

get_memo.description: Get the daily memo for a specific date.

upsert_memo.description: Create or update a daily memo.

list_notes.description: List all notes. You can search by keyword.

update_note.description: Update an existing note. Only specify the fields you want to change.

list_schedule.description: Get the schedule (events and todos) for a specific date.

create_schedule_item.description: Create a new event on the calendar.

update_schedule_item.description: Update an existing schedule event. Only specify the fields you want to change.

toggle_schedule_complete.description: Toggle completion status of a schedule event.

search_all.description: Search across todos, memos, and notes with a keyword.

params.domains: Where to search (todos / memos / notes, default: all)

generate_content.description: Generate rich content (headings, lists, tables, etc.) and write it to a note or memo.

params.target_id: Existing note/memo ID to update (omit to create new)
params.title: Title for new note

format_content.description: Restructure existing note or memo content. Wrap in callouts, add headings, and more.

list_wiki_tags.description: List all wiki tags. Tags are labels that connect todos, memos, and notes across domains.

tag_entity.description: Assign a wiki tag to a todo, memo, or note. Creates the tag automatically if it doesn't exist.

search_by_tag.description: Find todos, memos, and notes that have a specific wiki tag.

params.entity_type: Narrow by type (todo / memo / note, omit for all)

get_entity_tags.description: Get all wiki tags assigned to a specific todo, memo, or note.

shortcuts.heading: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.osGlobalShortcutsDesc: Work even when the app is not focused
shortcuts.editDescription: Press "Change" on a row, then type the keys to assign.
shortcuts.waiting: Waiting for input · Esc to stop

settings.previewText: Today's todos: make a shopping list and prep dinner
settings.languageDesc: Switch the display language. Changes apply across the whole app instantly.

immediate.title: Changes save instantly
immediate.body: There is no save button. Toggling applies to the whole app right away.

fontSize.title: Font size affects body text
fontSize.body: Headings and UI stay fixed; only body readability is adjusted.

palette.title: Search & change from ⌘K
palette.body: You can also change shortcut assignments from the command palette.

settings.fontFamilyDesc: Applies to body text across the app.

startup.heading: Startup
startup.description: Choose which section opens when the app starts.

reset.heading: Reset & local data
reset.description: Clear all preferences saved on this device (theme, font, shortcuts, layout) and reload. Synced data is not affected.
reset.confirm: Reset all local preferences and reload the app? This clears theme, font, shortcut, and layout choices on this device. Your synced data is not affected.

settings.startupScreenDesc: Choose which section opens when the app starts
settings.autoArchiveDesc: Automatically move completed todos to trash after a set period
settings.hideCompletedTasksDesc: Hide completed todos from the todo tree
settings.autoLaunchDesc: Automatically start Life Editor when you log in
settings.startMinimizedDesc: Launch the app in the background without showing the window
settings.trayIconDesc: Show an icon in the system tray with timer display

browser.title: Default browser for sidebar links
browser.description: URL links from the sidebar open in this browser. Falls back to the system default when none is selected.
browser.none: No supported browsers detected in /Applications. The system default will be used.

settings.globalShortcutsDesc: Keyboard shortcuts that work even when the app is not focused

mobileAccess.title: Mobile Access
mobileAccess.description: Access Life Editor from your iPhone/iPad on the same WiFi network.
mobileAccess.scanQr: Scan this QR code with your phone's camera

timerSettings.title: Timer
timerSettings.autoStartBreaksDesc: Automatically start break timer when work session ends
timerSettings.runningWarning: Timer is running. Changes will apply to the next session.

notifications.title: Notifications & Sounds
notifications.blocked: Notifications are blocked. Please enable them in browser settings.
notifications.description: Get notified when work/break sessions end

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.taskRemindersDesc: Get notified before a todo's scheduled time
reminders.dailyReviewDesc: Get a notification to review and plan your day

data.title: Data Management
data.importWarning: Import will overwrite all current data. A backup is created automatically before importing.
data.resetConfirm: All data will be deleted and the app will return to its initial state. This action cannot be undone. A backup is created automatically before resetting. Are you sure?

trash.emptyCategoryConfirm: Permanently empty the {{category}} trash. {{count}} item(s) will be deleted forever and cannot be restored. Proceed?
trash.errorDescription: There may be a connection problem. Please try again in a moment.
trash.cascadeWarning: Related sub-items and tag assignments are deleted together.
trash.permanentDeleteConfirm: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

updates.title: Updates
updates.upToDate: You are running the latest version.

performance.title: Performance Monitor
performance.noMetrics: No IPC metrics recorded yet. Use the app and refresh.

work.title: Work

history.empty: No recorded sessions yet. Start a Pomodoro or Free session to begin.

work.confirmSessionMessage: End this session and start a break?

taskSelector.heading: Linked Todo
taskSelector.emptyHint: No todos to link. Create a todo in Materials to select one.

completion.title: Session {{index}} complete
completion.body: Logged {{minutes}} min to “{{task}}”. Take a {{breakMinutes}}-minute break.

taskTree.title: Todo Tree
taskTree.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? It will be moved to Trash.

move.circularReference: Cannot move a todo into its own subtree
move.deletedNode: Cannot move a deleted item. Restore it first.

taskDetail.detailEmpty: Select a todo to view and edit it.
taskDetail.emptyState: Select a todo to view details

notes.mainEmpty: Select a note or create a new one
notes.assignTagHint: Drop onto a tag to assign it

files.rootFolderDescription: Select the folder to browse in the Files tab. Only files within this folder will be accessible.
files.noRootPath: No folder configured. Set it in Settings.
files.configureInSettings: Go to Settings > Advanced > Files to configure.

connect.title: Connect
connect.toggleConnectMode: Connect mode: drag between nodes to link

panel.title: Link these two
panel.searchPlaceholder: Search tags or type a new name...

graph.noMatch: No nodes match the current filters
graph.selectNodeHint: Select a node on the canvas to enable Local Graph
graph.tapHint: Tap a node to center it. Drag to move. Pinch / scroll to zoom.

empty.title: No connections yet
empty.hint: Add tags or links to your notes and they'll spread out here.

ideas.title: Connect
ideas.graphEmpty: No notes or memos yet. Create a note to see the canvas.
ideas.deleteBoardConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this board? This action cannot be undone.
ideas.emptyBoardMessage: No boards yet. Create one to get started.

schedule.noRoutineItems: No routine items for this day.

routineDeleteConfirm.title: Delete Routine
routineDeleteConfirm.description: How would you like to remove "{{title}}"?
routineDeleteConfirm.dismissOnlyDesc: Hides it from today's schedule. It will appear again tomorrow.
routineDeleteConfirm.archiveRoutineDesc: Archives the routine so it won't be auto-generated anymore. You can restore it from routine management.

routineTimeChange.title: Update routine time?
routineTimeChange.thisOnlyDesc: Only change today's schedule. The routine template stays the same.
routineTimeChange.applyToRoutineDesc: Also update the routine's default time for future schedules.

routineEditTimeChange.title: Update existing schedules?
routineEditTimeChange.templateOnlyDesc: Only change the routine's default time. Existing schedules are not affected.
routineEditTimeChange.applyToAllDesc: Also update all scheduled items from today onward.

scheduleScreen.title: Title
scheduleScreen.emptyBody: Click an empty slot to create one.

analytics.title: Analytics

work.title: No work sessions yet
work.description: Start your first pomodoro with the Work timer and your work-time analytics will appear here.

schedule.title: No events in this range
schedule.description: Complete events and routines and their completion rates and trends will show up here.

mobile.title: Nothing recorded yet
mobile.description: Once you start using the timer or the schedule, your daily summary will appear here.

analytics.noSessions: No work sessions recorded yet. Start a timer to track your work time.

streak.title: Streaks
streak.noStreak: Start working to build a streak!

panel.title: Tips
panel.noTips: No tips for this section yet.

viewSwitch.title: Switch month / week
viewSwitch.description: Use the toggle in the calendar header to switch between the monthly and weekly views.

openDay.title: Click a date
openDay.description: Click any date cell to set the focused date for the right sidebar's day view.

rightSidebar.title: Right sidebar shows the day
rightSidebar.description: The right sidebar shows that day's todos, routines, and events while the calendar is open.

contentFilter.title: Filter content types
contentFilter.description: Toggle Routines / Todos / Events / Daily / Notes from the right sidebar to hide what you don't need.

holidays.title: Holidays
holidays.description: National holidays show with a red tint when the holiday option is enabled.

addRoutineFromCell.title: Add a routine from a date
addRoutineFromCell.description: Hover a date cell and click the repeat icon to open the routine manager for that day.

switchTab.title: Day view via Day Flow
switchTab.description: There is no day view inside the calendar — switch to the Day Flow tab for a per-hour layout.

createFromCalendar.title: Create from a calendar cell
createFromCalendar.description: Hover a date in the calendar and click the repeat icon — the routine manager opens with a + New Routine button.

createFromSidebar.title: Create from the right sidebar
createFromSidebar.description: In the right sidebar's achievement panel, click the + button to add a routine without leaving the current view.

frequencyDaily.title: Daily
frequencyDaily.description: Set frequency to Daily to repeat every single day.

frequencyWeekdays.title: Specific weekdays
frequencyWeekdays.description: Pick the weekdays (Mon–Sun) the routine should run on.

frequencyInterval.title: Every N days
frequencyInterval.description: Pick a start date and an interval (≥ 2 days) to space out the routine.

edit.title: Edit a routine
edit.description: Click the pencil icon next to a routine to change title, time, frequency, or tags.

dismiss.title: Dismiss for today
dismiss.description: Hide a single occurrence with Dismiss — the routine reappears the next day.

archive.title: Archive
archive.description: Archive a routine to hide it from the schedule without deleting; restore later from the Archived list.

delete.title: Delete permanently
delete.description: Use the trash icon to remove a routine; the confirmation dialog also offers archive instead.

tags.title: Tag routines
tags.description: Assign tags so routines appear in tag filters and the Connect view.

openTab.title: Open the Day Flow tab
openTab.description: Switch to the Day Flow tab inside Schedule for an hourly timeline of one day.

dragTime.title: Drag to change time
dragTime.description: Grab a todo or routine block and drag it vertically to change its start time.

dualColumn.title: Dual-column layout
dualColumn.description: Toggle dual-column to view two days side by side.

contextAdd.title: Click an empty slot
contextAdd.description: Click an empty time slot to add a routine, todo, or note at that time.

rightClickEdit.title: Right-click for actions
rightClickEdit.description: Right-click a block to extend / shorten by 15 minutes, duplicate, or copy its time.

todayButton.title: Today button
todayButton.description: Press Today in the header to scroll back to the current day and time.

syncCalendar.title: Stays in sync with the calendar
syncCalendar.description: Picking a date in the Calendar tab updates the day shown here too.

filterTypes.title: Type filter
filterTypes.description: Use the right sidebar filters to hide event types you don't want to see.

addNote.title: Add a note inline
addNote.description: Adding a note from a slot creates a daily memo entry pinned to that time.

achievementPanel.title: Right sidebar panel
achievementPanel.description: Routine progress lives in the achievement panel at the bottom of the right sidebar.

daysCount.title: Days completed
daysCount.description: Counts the days you've completed at least one routine.

currentStreak.title: Current streak
currentStreak.description: How many consecutive days you've kept the routine going.

longestStreak.title: Longest streak
longestStreak.description: Your all-time best streak — useful for motivation.

details.title: Open the details
details.description: Click Details on the panel to open the per-routine breakdown overlay.

perGroup.title: Per-routine breakdown
perGroup.description: The details overlay shows completion rate for each individual routine.

moreInAnalytics.title: Charts in Analytics
moreInAnalytics.description: For trend charts and longer-range views switch to the Analytics section.

openSelector.title: Pick a todo at the top
openSelector.description: The todo selector sits at the top of the Work screen; click to choose what you'll focus on.

search.title: Search by name
search.description: Start typing to filter todos by title.

freeSession.title: Free session
freeSession.description: Skip todo selection to run a free, untied focus session.

startFromTree.title: Start from the todo tree
startFromTree.description: Click the play button next to any todo in the todo tree to jump into Work with it selected.

switchTask.title: Switch mid-session
switchTask.description: Selecting a different todo while the timer is running switches focus instantly without resetting it.

completionPrompt.title: Completion modal
completionPrompt.description: When a session ends a modal lets you mark the todo done or start the next session.

click.title: Click the circle
click.description: Click the circular timer to start or pause the current session.

spaceShortcut.title: Space to play / pause
spaceShortcut.description: Press Space (when not typing) to toggle play / pause from any screen.

resetR.title: R to reset
resetR.description: Press R (when not typing) to reset the current segment back to its full duration.

modalToggle.title: Cmd / Ctrl + Shift + T
modalToggle.description: Jump to the Work screen from anywhere with Cmd / Ctrl + Shift + T.

miniWidget.title: Sidebar mini timer
miniWidget.description: While a session is active the left sidebar shows the running todo and remaining time.

extend.title: Add 5 minutes
extend.description: Use the +5m button (visible while paused) to extend the current segment.

shorten.title: Subtract 5 minutes
shorten.description: Use the -5m button (visible while paused) to shorten the current segment.

sessionComplete.title: Skip the session
sessionComplete.description: Press Session Complete to end the current segment immediately and move on.

sidebarLocation.title: Settings live in the right sidebar
sidebarLocation.description: Pomodoro durations and settings are in the right sidebar of the Work screen.

durations.title: Custom durations
durations.description: Set your own work / short break / long break minutes.

longBreakRule.title: Long break cadence
longBreakRule.description: After N work sessions a long break kicks in (default 4).

autoBreak.title: Auto-start breaks
autoBreak.description: Enable auto-start so breaks (and the next work block) begin after a 3-second countdown.

sessionStructure.title: Session counter
sessionStructure.description: The 1/4 counter and progress dots show where you are in the current cycle.

completionEffects.title: Completion celebration
completionEffects.description: Confetti and a sound effect fire when you finish a todo during a session.

musicTab.title: Music tab
musicTab.description: Inside Work there are two tabs: Timer and Music. Switch to Music to manage playback.

playlist.title: Pick a playlist
playlist.description: Choose a playlist from the popover; tracks loop while the timer runs.

nowPlaying.title: Now Playing in the right sidebar
nowPlaying.description: The right sidebar's Now Playing card shows the current track and quick controls.

customSounds.title: Add a custom sound
customSounds.description: Use + Add Custom Sound to upload your own audio file.

soundTags.title: Tag your sounds
soundTags.description: Open Sound Tags to label custom sounds so they're easier to find later.

soundFilter.title: Filter sounds by tag
soundFilter.description: Use the sound tag filter to narrow the picker to a single mood or genre.

previewVolume.title: Preview volume
previewVolume.description: Each sound row has a preview slider to check volume without committing.

openTab.title: Open the Daily tab
openTab.description: Inside Materials, switch to the Daily tab to write per-day journal entries.

pickDate.title: Pick a day from the list
pickDate.description: The left list shows recent days grouped by month — click one to open it.

searchDate.title: Search by date
searchDate.description: Use the search box at the top of the day list to jump to a specific date.

richEditor.title: Rich editor
richEditor.description: Headings, lists, code, callouts and more — the editor handles markdown shortcuts as you type.

autoSave.title: Auto save
autoSave.description: Edits save as soon as you type; there is no save button.

templates.title: Daily templates
templates.description: Set a default daily template in Settings so each new day starts with your structure.

linkInline.title: Link a note inline
linkInline.description: Type [[ to open a note picker — selecting one inserts a wiki-style link.

tagInline.title: Tag inline
tagInline.description: Type @ to insert a tag suggestion.

create.title: Create a note
create.description: Click the + button at the top of the notes list to add a new note.

folders.title: Folders
folders.description: Group notes into folders, including nested folders.

drag.title: Drag to reorder
drag.description: Drag notes within the tree to reorder or move them into folders.

search.title: Search notes
search.description: Use the search box above the tree to find notes by title.

color.title: Color a folder
color.description: Right-click a folder (or use its menu) to pick a color from the color picker.

iconCustom.title: Custom icon
iconCustom.description: Open the icon picker to pick a custom icon for any note or folder.

softDelete.title: Soft delete
softDelete.description: Deleted notes go to the trash and can be restored later.

restore.title: Restore from trash
restore.description: Open Settings → Trash to restore or permanently delete.

noteLink.title: Note link with [[
noteLink.description: Type [[ inside any note or daily entry to insert a link to another note.

tag.title: Tag with @
tag.description: Type @ to assign a tag — pick from the suggestions or create a new one.

completion.title: Keyboard completion
completion.description: Use ↑ / ↓ then Enter inside the suggestion popover to confirm.

click.title: Click to open
click.description: Clicking a wiki link opens the target note in the same view.

rename.title: Auto-rename
rename.description: Renaming a note updates the visible label of inbound wiki links automatically.

graphLink.title: Shows up in the graph
graphLink.description: Linked notes and tags appear connected in the Connect graph view.

rootFolder.title: Set a root folder
rootFolder.description: Choose a root folder in Settings to make the file tree usable.

tree.title: Tree view
tree.description: Browse files with collapsible folders, just like Finder.

search.title: Search filenames
search.description: Use the search box to filter the tree by filename.

openOs.title: Open in your OS
openOs.description: Right-click a file and choose Reveal in Finder / Explorer to open it natively.

createNew.title: Create file or folder
createNew.description: Use the + button to create a new file or folder inside the selected folder.

delete.title: Delete safely
delete.description: Deletion goes through your OS trash, so files can be recovered if needed.

view.title: Open the graph
view.description: Switch to the Nodes tab in Connect to see notes and tags as a graph.

drag.title: Drag nodes
drag.description: Drag any node to reposition it on the canvas.

zoom.title: Zoom & pan
zoom.description: Pinch / scroll to zoom and drag the empty canvas to pan around.

focusNode.title: Focus a note
focusNode.description: Selecting a note in the sidebar centers the graph on it.

color.title: Tag color
color.description: Nodes adopt the color of their dominant tag, set in the tag manager.

savePosition.title: Layout is remembered
savePosition.description: Your manual placements are saved so the layout doesn't reset on reload.

fromNote.title: Jump to the source note
fromNote.description: Click a note node to open it in the Notes view.

assign.title: Assign a tag
assign.description: Type @tagname inside a note or memo to attach a tag.

create.title: Create new tags
create.description: Confirming a typed tag that doesn't exist creates it on the fly.

rename.title: Rename safely
rename.description: Renaming a tag updates every place it's referenced.

color.title: Set a color
color.description: Pick a color in the tag manager — it carries through to the graph.

filter.title: Filter by tag
filter.description: Use the tag filter overlay to narrow the view to one or more tags.

manageInSettings.title: Tag manager
manageInSettings.description: Open Settings to manage all tags (rename, recolor, delete).

graphCluster.title: Tags cluster the graph
graphCluster.description: Notes that share tags appear closer together in the graph.

show.title: Right pane lists backlinks
show.description: While viewing a note, the right pane lists which other notes link to it.

unlinked.title: Unlinked mentions
unlinked.description: The unlinked tab shows places where the note's title is mentioned without a link.

click.title: Click to jump
click.description: Click any backlink entry to open the source note.

context.title: Surrounding text
context.description: Each backlink shows a snippet of the paragraph it appeared in.

count.title: Backlink count
count.description: The note tree shows the number of inbound links next to each note.

navigate.title: Quick navigation
navigate.description: Use backlinks to walk between related notes without the graph.

search.title: Search bar
search.description: The Connect sidebar's search bar filters the view by free-text query.

byTag.title: Tag filter
byTag.description: Apply tag filters to keep only matching notes / memos.

noteType.title: Notes only
noteType.description: Switch the type filter to Notes to hide memos.

memoType.title: Memos only
memoType.description: Switch the type filter to Memos to hide notes.

viewMode.title: Switch view mode
viewMode.description: Toggle between graph and list views — both honor the active filter.

persisted.title: Filters persist
persisted.description: Your active tab and view mode are remembered across reloads.

openSection.title: Open Analytics
openSection.description: Switch to the Analytics section to see cross-domain dashboards.

todayDashboard.title: Today dashboard
todayDashboard.description: The top of Overview shows today's totals: focus time, completed todos, and pomodoro count.

periodSelector.title: Right sidebar period
periodSelector.description: Pick day / week / month from the period selector in the right sidebar.

datePresets.title: Date presets
datePresets.description: Quick presets cover 7 / 30 days, this month, 3 months, and all time.

weeklySummary.title: Weekly summary
weeklySummary.description: The weekly summary card compares this week against the previous one with up / down arrows.

streak.title: Streak (days)
streak.description: Streak counters show current and longest consecutive days.

switchTabs.title: Six tabs
switchTabs.description: Switch between Overview / Todos / Schedule / Materials / Work / Connect for focused views.

completionTrend.title: Completion trend
completionTrend.description: Track completed and created todos across the chosen period.

stagnation.title: Stagnation chart
stagnation.description: Highlights todos that have been open the longest without progress.

byProject.title: Project work time
byProject.description: Compare focused time across folders / projects.

workTime.title: Per-todo work time
workTime.description: Spot which individual todos consumed the most focused time.

filterPeriod.title: Period filter
filterPeriod.description: All todo analytics respect the period selector in the right sidebar.

tabFocus.title: Focused view
tabFocus.description: The Todos tab strips away cross-domain noise and focuses on todo metrics.

workChart.title: Work time chart
workChart.description: Daily focused work time as a bar chart.

heatmap.title: Work heatmap
heatmap.description: Day-of-week × hour-of-day heatmap reveals when you actually focus.

balance.title: Work / break balance
balance.description: Compare work time vs break time at a glance.

pomodoroRate.title: Pomodoro completion rate
pomodoroRate.description: Track how often planned pomodoros are completed.

dailyTimeline.title: Daily timeline
dailyTimeline.description: Visualises sessions on a 24-hour timeline for the chosen day.

scheduleTab.title: Schedule tab
scheduleTab.description: The Schedule analytics tab focuses on event and routine completion.

eventDistribution.title: Event distribution
eventDistribution.description: See how events are distributed across hours of the day.

noteCreation.title: Note creation trend
noteCreation.description: Daily note creation chart shows your writing cadence.

memoHeatmap.title: Memo heatmap
memoHeatmap.description: Surface missed days in your daily memo with the heatmap.

byFolder.title: Notes by folder
byFolder.description: See note distribution across folders to spot dominant projects.

tagUsage.title: Tag usage
tagUsage.description: Top tags by frequency, with counts.

tagEntityType.title: Tag × entity type
tagEntityType.description: Breaks tag assignments down by entity type (note / memo / todo).

connectSummary.title: Connection summary
connectSummary.description: Summary of cross-entity connections drawn from the Connect view.

calendar.deleteTaskMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this todo?
calendar.deleteNoteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this note?
calendar.dailyExists: Daily already exists for this date

playlist.empty: No playlists yet. Create one to get started.
playlist.noTracks: No tracks. Add sounds to this playlist.

calendarSidebar.title: Schedule
calendarSidebar.empty: No calendars yet. Create one to filter todos by folder.

notesView.emptyState: Select a note or create a new one
notesView.detailEmpty: Select a note to view and edit it.

taskDetailPanel.selectTask: Select a todo to view details

taskDetailSidebar.noSelection: Select a todo to view details

routineGroup.noGroupsHint: No groups yet — create one above.
routineGroup.name: Group Name
routineGroup.slideHint: Changing start time slides all member routines

wikiTags.title: Tags
wikiTags.description: Manage wiki tags used across todos, memos, and notes. Type @tag in any editor to create inline tags.
wikiTags.empty: No tags yet. Type @tag in an editor to create one.
wikiTags.mergeSelectTarget: Click another tag to merge into

soundEffects.title: Sound Effects
soundEffects.confettiDescription: Show confetti when a todo is completed

events.emptyState: Select an event to view details

eventDetail.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this event?

screenLock.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters

drawer.title: Menu
drawer.sectionContentEmpty: No additional content for this section.

timer.title: Timer defaults
timer.runningNote: Stop the timer to adjust defaults.

trash.title: Trash
trash.truncatedNote: Showing latest 100 — manage more on desktop.

connection.subtitle: Connect to your desktop app
connection.step1: Open Life Editor on your desktop
connection.step3: Scan the QR code or paste the URL below
connection.error: Connection failed. Check the URL and try again.
connection.invalidUrl: Invalid URL. Use the QR code or paste the full connection URL.

templates.title: Templates
templates.deleteDefaultWarning: This is the default template. Delete anyway?

auth.tagline: Your workspace for designing and recording your life
auth.footerSignIn: No account yet? Create one from "Sign up" above.
auth.footerSignUp: Already have an account? Switch to "Sign in" above.

errors.alreadyRegistered: This email address is already registered
errors.noSession: Signed up, but no session was started. Check that confirm-email is disabled (Phase 1).
errors.generic: Authentication failed. Please wait a moment and try again.

briefing.noBriefing: No briefing yet. Write a "Briefing" heading section in today's daily and it will appear here.
